painSection.title: Why you're capping out.

cards.title: No organization.
cards.description: Telegram isn't built to manage several models, several chatters and hundreds of fans in parallel. Everything goes off in all directions. No global view, no priorities.

cards.title: No vault. No scripts.
cards.description: Your chatters dig through ten folders for their media and retype the same lines by hand, conversation after conversation. Every minute lost searching is one sale less.

cards.title: Your external processor eats into your margin.
cards.description: Third-party processors take a big commission on every sale. Notifications arrive late, by email. You know neither when the sale happened, nor which chatter closed it.

cards.title: Your tracking is a handmade Google Sheet.
cards.description: Your chatters log every sale line by line across scattered tabs. It's time-consuming, fragile, and the day you scale to 5 chatters, it's unmanageable.

painSection.bridgeText:
The result: you're capping out. Without a CRM that centralizes and automates all of this,
it's mathematically impossible to scale an off-platform OFM agency.

pivot.line1: The real problem isn't your agency.
pivot.supportText:
You want to grow your agency, but you're not making the right decisions
because your chatting is stuck.

faq.title: Your questions, our answers.
faq.subtitle: Everything we tell you here, we stand behind.

items.question: How do I connect my Telegram and WhatsApp accounts?
items.answer: You scan a QR code from your existing Telegram or WhatsApp account. It takes a few seconds, nothing to install, no technical configuration required. SyncAgency connects to the existing account: your full conversation history is recovered automatically, all your contacts too. Telegram Business and standard WhatsApp accounts are both supported. You can connect several accounts in parallel under the same dashboard.

items.question: Can my chatters switch between several models in a single window?
items.answer: Yes. Each chatter sees in their sidebar all the models they have access to, with their real-time activity status. They switch from one to another in one click, without reloading or changing tabs. Conversations, the Vault and scripts are kept separate by model: the chatter never risks sending the wrong content to the wrong fan. Ideal when a team manages 3 to 10 creators in parallel.

items.question: The Vault — how do my chatters use it during the conversation?
items.answer: You first set up the scripts in the Vault, organized by model and by sales phase (opener, upsell, closer, follow-up...). During the conversation, the chatter clicks the Vault button to open the panel, selects the desired phase and sends the message in 1 click. Dynamic variables ({firstname}, {lastpurchase}) fill in automatically. Zero copy-paste, zero improvisation, messages always clean.

items.question: Mass DM by campaign — how do I segment my fans?
items.answer: You filter by three axes: the fan's activity status, a group you create yourself, or a custom tag you put on each conversation. You can combine several filters, for example: fans active in the last 7 days + tag "high value". You select your script from the Vault, you customize the dynamic variables, and you launch. Each campaign is measured separately: messages sent, reply rate, revenue generated.

items.question: The integrated payment processor — which payment methods are supported?
items.answer: Credit card and Apple Pay via our integrated processor (20% markup added on the fan side), plus native Telegram Stars directly in the conversation. Payment is triggered in the conversation. The fan never leaves to an external site. You receive the notification the second the transaction is confirmed, with the name of the chatter who closed and the model concerned. No email delay, no fuzzy attribution.

items.question: How do I track the exact performance of each chatter?
items.answer: Everything is auto-tracked without any manual entry: messages sent, sales closed, response speed, conversion rate, revenue per hour worked, and activity in % on each shift. The dashboard displays the golden ratio of each chatter — the ratio between messages sent and sales closed — to identify at a glance who really performs and who just fills the chat without converting. You find a leaderboard with drill-down by chatter, by model and by period. No more Google Sheet to fill in by hand.

items.question: Why do you take a 20% commission on payments?
items.answer: Because that's the operational cost of an integrated, clean and reliable payment processor. Not a hidden margin. Compare it to the 40% that OnlyFans, MYM or Fansly take on your sales, twice as much. And with us, the commission is added on the fan side, not the agency side: you get 100% of your nominal price.

items.question: I'm already on another CRM, how do I migrate?
items.answer: Migration is fast and non-destructive. You keep your current CRM running in parallel during the transition. Step 1: you connect your Telegram and WhatsApp accounts via QR code (2 minutes per account), your full history is recovered automatically. Step 2: you import your media and scripts into the Vault by model. Step 3: you invite your team of chatters. On the Empire OS plan, migration is entirely assisted for free. On the Core Chatting and Growth Marketing plans, a detailed migration guide is provided as soon as you sign up.

items.question: What is the French alternative to Infloww?
items.answer: SyncAgency is the French alternative to Infloww, specifically built for OFM agencies that chat on Telegram and WhatsApp. Unlike Infloww, which is optimized for native OnlyFans, SyncAgency covers off-platform with a complete Telegram CRM, an integrated payment processor (20% vs 40% on OF), Mass DM by campaign and automatic chatter tracking. FR support, launched in 2026, based in France.

items.question: What is an OFM CRM?
items.answer: An OFM CRM (OnlyFans Management CRM) is a tool dedicated to agencies that manage several creators and their revenue. It centralizes conversations with fans, tracks the performance of each chatter, manages the vault of media and scripts, processes PPV payments, and tracks sales in real time. SyncAgency is an OFM CRM specialized for off-platform (Telegram + WhatsApp) with a focus on French-speaking agencies.

items.question: How does an OFM payment processor work?
items.answer: An OFM payment processor lets agencies sell PPV (Pay-Per-View) content to their fans outside of OnlyFans. The options: native platform (OnlyFans/MYM = 40% commission), external processors (email notification, fuzzy attribution), or a processor integrated into the CRM like SyncAgency (20% on the fan side, real-time notification, automatic attribution to the chatter). The integrated processor is more profitable and more precise.

items.question: Why use Telegram to sell instead of OnlyFans?
items.answer: OFM agencies use Telegram to avoid the 40% OnlyFans commission, keep ownership of their fan base, and have more control over communication. The conversion rate is also better than OnlyFans: the direct fan-creator relationship, without the platform interface, generates more impulse purchases and a higher average basket. But raw Telegram isn't built for agency management: no tracking, no vault, no integrated processor. SyncAgency turns Telegram into a complete CRM for OFM agencies.

items.question: Is SyncAgency free?
items.answer: SyncAgency offers a 7-day free trial on all plans, with no commitment and no credit card required. You get access to all the plan's features from day one. At the end of the 7 days, your account is deactivated if you don't subscribe — no automatic charge. Subscriptions then start at 59€ per model per month (Core Chatting), 89€ (Growth Marketing) and 129€ (Empire OS).
